system: You are proposing baseline QUALITY GATES for a software system, given a list of its observable signals. A gate is a metric over one or more signals that is worth monitoring. Do NOT set any threshold/target number (a human will). For each gate give a compute type from [rate, ratio, p95, psi, count, mean], a direction ('min' = higher-is-better, 'max' = lower-is-better), and 'inputs' = the list of signal keys it is computed from. Return JSON: {"gates":[{"key","description","direction","compute","inputs","segment_dimension","rationale"}]}.
raw_response: {"gates":[{"key":"gate.run_completion_rate","description":"Share of started runs that reach a terminal done event (succeeded or failed).","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.run.start","sse.event.done"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Detects dropped/abandoned runs, SSE disconnect issues, or orchestration hangs where a run never terminates."},{"key":"gate.run_success_rate","description":"Share of terminal runs that end in succeeded status (vs failed).","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.done"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Primary reliability KPI for the end-to-end pipeline; segments isolate regressions to specific agents/models."},{"key":"gate.sse_error_rate_per_run","description":"Rate of SSE error events per started run.","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["sse.event.error","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,recoverable","rationale":"Tracks user-visible failures and recoverable vs non-recoverable error mix; spikes indicate upstream/tool/model issues."},{"key":"gate.recoverable_error_ratio","description":"Fraction of SSE errors marked recoverable.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.error"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Higher recoverable share suggests resilience; a shift toward non-recoverable errors indicates harder failures/regressions."},{"key":"gate.streaming_output_presence_rate","description":"Share of started runs that emit at least one message delta (streaming output).","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.message.delta","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Ensures the user sees streaming progress; detects silent runs, buffering, or SSE delivery problems."},{"key":"gate.status_update_rate_per_run","description":"Average count of agent status updates per started run.","direction":"min","compute":"mean","inputs":["sse.event.agent.status","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,phase","rationale":"Guards against missing progress telemetry and helps detect stuck phases (no updates) or overly chatty loops (too many updates)."},{"key":"gate.web_search_usage_rate","description":"Share of started runs that invoke the web_search tool at least once.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.tool.web_search","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Detects tool routing regressions where research stops using search when expected (or unexpectedly overuses it)."},{"key":"gate.web_search_result_count_mean","description":"Mean resultCount reported by web_search events.","direction":"min","compute":"mean","inputs":["sse.event.tool.web_search"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,query_result_state","rationale":"Monitors search quality/availability; drops can indicate provider issues, blocked queries, or parsing changes."},{"key":"gate.brief_completion_rate","description":"Share of runs that emit a completed research brief.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.brief.complete","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Validates the research stage completes; catches failures between partial and complete brief generation."},{"key":"gate.brief_partial_to_complete_ratio","description":"Ratio of partial brief events to completed brief events.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.brief.partial","sse.event.brief.complete"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Detects stalls (many partials, few completes) and changes in streaming behavior that may impact UX or cost."},{"key":"gate.kb_doc_scrape_success_rate","description":"Share of KB document status events that indicate successful scrape completion (vs error/failure states).","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.doc.status"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,status","rationale":"Monitors KB ingestion health; failures here cascade into poor retrieval and drafting quality."},{"key":"gate.kb_embedding_progress_completeness","description":"Share of embedding progress events that reach completion (chunks embedded equals total).","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.kb.embedding"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Ensures embeddings finish; incomplete embeddings reduce retrieval coverage and can indicate timeouts or worker failures."},{"key":"gate.profile_completion_rate","description":"Share of runs that emit a completed brand profile.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.profile.complete","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Validates the brand voice/structure distillation stage; missing profiles degrade downstream drafting consistency."},{"key":"gate.retrieval_usage_rate","description":"Share of started runs that emit at least one retrieval event (KB chunks used).","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.retrieval","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Detects RAG pipeline regressions where drafting/refinement stops using KB context."},{"key":"gate.retrieval_score_distribution_psi","description":"Population Stability Index (PSI) of retrieval chunk scores compared to a baseline distribution.","direction":"max","compute":"psi","inputs":["sse.event.retrieval"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Flags shifts in retrieval relevance (e.g., embedding model changes, index corruption, chunking changes) even if success rates remain stable."},{"key":"gate.draft_completion_rate","description":"Share of started runs that emit a completed draft.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.draft.complete","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Ensures drafting stage completes; isolates failures before editing/refinement."},{"key":"gate.final_completion_rate","description":"Share of started runs that emit a completed final copy.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.final.complete","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"End-to-end product completion KPI; captures failures in editing/link verification and final assembly."},{"key":"gate.link_check_failure_rate","description":"Share of checked links that are reported as failing (non-OK status).","direction":"max","compute":"ratio","inputs":["sse.event.link.checked"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,status,httpCode","rationale":"Monitors link verification quality and external link health; spikes can indicate parser changes or network issues."},{"key":"gate.editor_passes_p95","description":"95th percentile of editor pass count per run (iterations needed).","direction":"max","compute":"p95","inputs":["sse.event.edit.pass"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Detects hard-to-fix outputs or looping editor behavior that increases latency/cost and risks timeouts."},{"key":"gate.db_run_recording_rate","description":"Share of started runs that are recorded in agent_runs table.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.agent_runs","sse.event.run.start"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,status","rationale":"Ensures auditability/reconnect support; missing rows indicate persistence failures or pipeline bypass."},{"key":"gate.db_brief_persistence_rate","description":"Share of completed briefs that are persisted to research_briefs.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.research_briefs","sse.event.brief.complete"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Guards against data loss between SSE emission and DB persistence for research artifacts."},{"key":"gate.db_kb_document_persistence_rate","description":"Share of KB doc status events that result in a kb_documents write.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.kb_documents","sse.event.doc.status"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,status","rationale":"Ensures ingestion results are stored for later retrieval/debugging; detects write failures or mismatched lifecycle."},{"key":"gate.db_kb_chunk_write_rate_per_doc","description":"Average number of kb_chunks writes per kb_documents write.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.kb_chunks","db.write.kb_documents"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Monitors chunking/embedding pipeline output volume; sudden drops suggest chunking failures, truncation, or embedding outages."},{"key":"gate.db_profile_persistence_rate","description":"Share of completed profiles that are persisted to brand_profiles.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.brand_profiles","sse.event.profile.complete"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Ensures brand profile artifacts are durable and editable later; detects persistence regressions."},{"key":"gate.db_draft_persistence_rate","description":"Share of completed drafts that are persisted to drafts.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.drafts","sse.event.draft.complete"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Prevents loss of generated drafts and supports later refinement; catches DB write failures."},{"key":"gate.db_finalcopy_persistence_rate","description":"Share of completed final copies that are persisted by the editor to final_copies.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.final_copies.editor","sse.event.final.complete"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model","rationale":"Ensures the final artifact is stored for delivery/versioning; detects editor persistence issues."},{"key":"gate.chat_persistence_coverage","description":"Share of SSE chat messages (user + assistant) that are persisted to chat_messages.","direction":"min","compute":"ratio","inputs":["db.write.chat_messages","sse.event.chat.user","sse.event.chat.assistant"],"segment_dimension":"agent,model,role","rationale":"Ensures refinement conversations are durable and replayable; detects message loss between SSE and DB."}]}

gates.description: Share of started runs that reach a terminal done event (succeeded or failed).
gates.rationale: Detects dropped/abandoned runs, SSE disconnect issues, or orchestration hangs where a run never terminates.

gates.description: Share of terminal runs that end in succeeded status (vs failed).
gates.rationale: Primary reliability KPI for the end-to-end pipeline; segments isolate regressions to specific agents/models.

gates.description: Rate of SSE error events per started run.
gates.rationale: Tracks user-visible failures and recoverable vs non-recoverable error mix; spikes indicate upstream/tool/model issues.

gates.description: Fraction of SSE errors marked recoverable.
gates.rationale: Higher recoverable share suggests resilience; a shift toward non-recoverable errors indicates harder failures/regressions.

gates.description: Share of started runs that emit at least one message delta (streaming output).
gates.rationale: Ensures the user sees streaming progress; detects silent runs, buffering, or SSE delivery problems.

gates.description: Average count of agent status updates per started run.
gates.rationale: Guards against missing progress telemetry and helps detect stuck phases (no updates) or overly chatty loops (too many updates).

gates.description: Share of started runs that invoke the web_search tool at least once.
gates.rationale: Detects tool routing regressions where research stops using search when expected (or unexpectedly overuses it).

gates.description: Mean resultCount reported by web_search events.
gates.rationale: Monitors search quality/availability; drops can indicate provider issues, blocked queries, or parsing changes.

gates.description: Share of runs that emit a completed research brief.
gates.rationale: Validates the research stage completes; catches failures between partial and complete brief generation.

gates.description: Ratio of partial brief events to completed brief events.
gates.rationale: Detects stalls (many partials, few completes) and changes in streaming behavior that may impact UX or cost.

gates.description: Share of KB document status events that indicate successful scrape completion (vs error/failure states).
gates.rationale: Monitors KB ingestion health; failures here cascade into poor retrieval and drafting quality.

gates.description: Share of embedding progress events that reach completion (chunks embedded equals total).
gates.rationale: Ensures embeddings finish; incomplete embeddings reduce retrieval coverage and can indicate timeouts or worker failures.

gates.description: Share of runs that emit a completed brand profile.
gates.rationale: Validates the brand voice/structure distillation stage; missing profiles degrade downstream drafting consistency.

gates.description: Share of started runs that emit at least one retrieval event (KB chunks used).
gates.rationale: Detects RAG pipeline regressions where drafting/refinement stops using KB context.

gates.description: Population Stability Index (PSI) of retrieval chunk scores compared to a baseline distribution.
gates.rationale: Flags shifts in retrieval relevance (e.g., embedding model changes, index corruption, chunking changes) even if success rates remain stable.

gates.description: Share of started runs that emit a completed draft.
gates.rationale: Ensures drafting stage completes; isolates failures before editing/refinement.

gates.description: Share of started runs that emit a completed final copy.
gates.rationale: End-to-end product completion KPI; captures failures in editing/link verification and final assembly.

gates.description: Share of checked links that are reported as failing (non-OK status).
gates.rationale: Monitors link verification quality and external link health; spikes can indicate parser changes or network issues.

gates.description: 95th percentile of editor pass count per run (iterations needed).
gates.rationale: Detects hard-to-fix outputs or looping editor behavior that increases latency/cost and risks timeouts.

gates.description: Share of started runs that are recorded in agent_runs table.
gates.rationale: Ensures auditability/reconnect support; missing rows indicate persistence failures or pipeline bypass.

gates.description: Share of completed briefs that are persisted to research_briefs.
gates.rationale: Guards against data loss between SSE emission and DB persistence for research artifacts.

gates.description: Share of KB doc status events that result in a kb_documents write.
gates.rationale: Ensures ingestion results are stored for later retrieval/debugging; detects write failures or mismatched lifecycle.

gates.description: Average number of kb_chunks writes per kb_documents write.
gates.rationale: Monitors chunking/embedding pipeline output volume; sudden drops suggest chunking failures, truncation, or embedding outages.

gates.description: Share of completed profiles that are persisted to brand_profiles.
gates.rationale: Ensures brand profile artifacts are durable and editable later; detects persistence regressions.

gates.description: Share of completed drafts that are persisted to drafts.
gates.rationale: Prevents loss of generated drafts and supports later refinement; catches DB write failures.

gates.description: Share of completed final copies that are persisted by the editor to final_copies.
gates.rationale: Ensures the final artifact is stored for delivery/versioning; detects editor persistence issues.

gates.description: Share of SSE chat messages (user + assistant) that are persisted to chat_messages.
gates.rationale: Ensures refinement conversations are durable and replayable; detects message loss between SSE and DB.
